member.name: T:ILNumerics.Drawing.Tests.ScenesCollection
member.summary: Object TestAppController, controls switching between test scenes.

member.name: F:ILNumerics.Drawing.Tests.ScenesCollection.testScenes
member.summary: A public list if all tests defined for this assembly.

member.name: M:ILNumerics.Drawing.Tests.ScenesCollection.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor, creates a list of all user defined tests in current assembly.

member.name: M:ILNumerics.Drawing.Tests.ScenesCollection.GetSceneByName(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Method searches a scene by its type name and returns the scene object to assign to render target.
member.param: The scene name to search for.
member.returns: Object Scene with user defined scene or null if scene was not found.

member.name: T:ILNumerics.Drawing.TestCategory
member.summary: Enumeration of all possible implemented test categories.

member.name: T:ILNumerics.Drawing.TestScene
member.summary: Abstract class description for all graphical tests.

member.name: M:ILNumerics.Drawing.TestScene.GetName
member.summary: Method returns user defined test name.

member.name: M:ILNumerics.Drawing.TestScene.GetDescription
member.summary: Method returns user defined test short description.

member.name: M:ILNumerics.Drawing.TestScene.GetCategory
member.summary: Method returns user defined test category.
